transcript.text:
[Ulleungdo Episode 3]
[9kgs of Pork Belly]
[How will it be cooked?]
[On a stone grill]
Can the wind stop blowing?
[Nope]
[Chaos]
[Can we finish filming?]
[Forget the fried rice!]
You didn't finish it all
[Will Tzuyang be able to do it?]
[Starting now]
[Today's Ulleung Island sunrise]
Hello everyone
I'm on my way to eat some Korean BBQ
[Bag full of meat]

I went grocery shopping
Gom-soon!
Cute
[Do you have mine?]
-Hello sir -Hi
He is the lessor of the property
Nice to meet you all
-I will share some later -Thank you
She says she can eat 3kgs of meat
By herself?
[Speechless]
Pork belly,
Pork shoulder,
Shank,
More pork belly!
Looks good!

[Extra ingredients]
[3kg of pork] That's a lot of meat
We'd get full after eating 2 strips
Wow, really
How will you eat all of that?
[All ready]
[Tired from carrying around 3kg]
The owner provided me with a stone grill
I'm going to cook it here
Firewood...
I had a hard time starting a fire last time
So I bought this
Spray some on
I'm scared!
[It's working!]
That works really well

[Heating up the grill]
It should be ready
It seems ready
Let's wipe it down first
Get it nice and oily
[What a view] I see a boat passing by!
The grill is good to go now
Pork belly first! Amazing
It's going to cook so fast
He said this grill makes everything tasty
I'm curious
[Cooked pretty fast]
It cooks really fast
The atmosphere is no joke
It's amazing
It's windy and pretty chaotic right now

But this looks so good
This one is cooked well
Let's get them out before they get burned
It's too well-done
Let's give it a try now
Bon appetit
I'll try it plain
On a stone grill..
It's my first time ever
Thank you
Let's transfer them over
The meat is very chewy
He recommended me a perfect spot to buy the meat
It's so cooked that they're crispy
[Facetiming with his daughter]
[Cheers her on] Thank you!

It's cooked too much since I couldn't control the fire
Crispy and delicious nonetheless
There's oil all over the camera lens
It's smudged now
[Maybe that's a good thing?]
I think this would've been perfect if I took it off the grill a little earlier
This is like a chip It's crunchy
But it's good
I'm going to eat 1 as a whole now
It's cooked really well
Yummy
[Is it too big?]
[Not a chance]
It's good
Let's do it right this time
It's perfect!

I'll put some kimchi on here too After I oil it up
[Put the whole thing on it]
[Add the scallions too]
[And some garlic]
Garlic on top
Some black pepper
And salt
[Starting to get really windy]
It would've been nice if it wasn't so windy!
Why is it so windy?
That looks good Let's get them out now
Now the kimchi will get cooked in pork oil
Some meat first
[Reheating the meat]
It looks so good
[Hot]

[Help!]
I cooked green onion here too
I can eat them
Let's get some on here
Some kimchi on here
Kimchi tastes great too
Amazing
Some green onions too
I'll move them and reheat them after
Let's cook some more while we eat
I believe this is the shank
This is the shoulder
[Some black pepper]
Oh, this is herb salt? So do I even need to put black pepper on it?
I overcooked this one
It's tasty

[Garlic refill]
Potatoes on here would've been so nice
Do you want some potatoes?
-I'll get you some if you want -Really?
[You can tell he's done this many times]
[There you go]
Thank you
Let's get some more meat
So cooking on the stone grill...
It just feels different
But tastes the same
The scenery is incredible
The sunlight on the horizon
[I guess so]
Let's cut it up
I want to give him some meat

I'm going to give some to the staff and the owner
I will eat the rest
Kimchi tastes delicious
I'll give some kimchi too
Kimchi is the best
My potatoes
They're starting to stick
Oh no
Potato chip?
It seems like it
What? This is actually like a potato chip
Let's get it all on the dish And cook a new batch while I eat
The hotness of the grill is just about right
All the shoulder on here
Cook it all this time
Some green onions

Is this the shank?
It's so good
Hot!
I bought some wrap to go with it
It's going to all fly away if I take it out
I'm not even close to getting full yet
Should I make some fried rice on here?
The potatoes are nicely cooked
That looks really good
This looks good too
It seems ready to eat
That wind
I won't fly away because I just ate 2kg of food
That's a strong gust of wind
[Tzuyang fighting off the wind and the pork belly]
[While Gom-soon fights off hunger]

Treat for you
[See ya]
Can you see that light?
Those are squid boats
That tastes so good
[But still a little too hot]
I forgot I had lettuce
Get some ssamjang (spicy seasoning paste)
Some kimchi too
Should I try the potato?
Let's drink some coke
[Fueling]
[Starting to rain a little]
What do I do now? I need to hurry and eat
[Worries about the food than herself]
[Oh no!]

I don't think we can do fried rice today
[Just stop eating and head inside]
[This ain't right]
[I'll be here to protect you]
Typhoon! It's a typhoon!
I think I'll have to end the mukbang here It feels like a typhoon
You didn't finish it all
I thought you said you could do it
[Well, sir...]
Wind wind wind wind!
Help me!
The lights are gone I can't eat fried rice here
It really is a bit windy today
